places.name: Temppeliaukio Church
places.description: A subterranean house of worship carved right out of the bedrock.

places.name: The National Library of Finland
places.description: Architecturally stunning library serves as the hub of Finnish scholarly life and culture.

places.name: Götan Maailma
places.description: A lovingly curated curio shop in which the taxidermy wear newspaper party hats, and peanut shells are spread across every surface.

places.name: Kamppi Chapel
places.description: An alien church provides much needed silence in the midst of a Finland shopping center.

places.name: Bad Bad Boy
places.description: This endearingly discomfited urinating statue commemorates the sneaky pees had by us all.

places.name: Fortress of Suomenlinna
places.description: This irregularly shaped sea fortress has defended not one but three different sovereign states.

places.name: Sibelius Monument
places.description: An abstract monument to a symphonic composer.
